titleStmt.title: SII 38.476: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 476. (A.R. No. 476 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription states that the king issued an order to the temple staff, viz., dēvakanmi, śrīmāhēśvarak-kaṇkāṇi and śrīkāriyam-śeivār at Tiruttūṟaippūṇḍi in Vaṇḍāḻaivēḷūr-kūṟṟam in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu confirming the tax-free status of 5 vēli and 18 mā of land at Śāttamaṅgalam in Vaṇḍaḻaiveḷūr-kūṟṟam as dēvadāṉaiṟaiyil owned by the temples (tirunāmattukkāṇi) of 1. Mugattalai-Paṉṉatarapāṇiīśvaram-uḍaiyār, 2. Tirukkōḍikuḻakar of Umbar-nāḍu, 3. Soṉṉavāraṟivār of Koṟṟamaṅgalam, 4. Tiruiḍumbāvāṉam-uḍaiyār of Dāṉatoṅgapuram, and 5. Umāpatīśvaram uḍaiyār of Kuḍapulam. This grant was for providing offerings. It appears that the earlier grant of 4(1/2) vēli and odd of land which was granted as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili was changed into taxable one and shrank in extent and it was now exchanged for the above land. It is also recorded that all the taxes were waived and the land tax (kāṇikkaḍaṉ) was fixed at 10:6 i.e., sixty kalam of paddy per vēli for conducting the offerings.

The inscription then gives the break-up of the allotment of land for various services in the above shrines. The king also ordered the revenue officials to issue a copy (uḷvari) of the tax-arrangement.
Rājēndrasiṅga-mūvēndavēlāṉ, an official (tirumandira-ōlai) and Sēdiyarāyaṉ, Kāliṅgarāyaṉ and other officials figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉacakkaravatti koṉeriṉmaiko
ṇṭāṉ Irācentiracoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu
vaṇṭāḻai veḷurkūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār
tiruttuṟaippūṇṭi Uṭaiyār koyil tevaka
ṉmikkum śrīmākeśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum
cikāriyañceyvāṉukkum Ittevarkku veṇṭum nima
ntaṅka(ḷ)ḷukku Iṟuppatāka puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu Eḻilū
ril tevatāṉayiṟaiyiliyāy ceravallāmaiyil mā
ṟiṉa nilam nālemukkāle nāṉmāvarai Araikkāṇi mun
tirikai kiḻ mukkāle Araikkāṇikku paṟṟukkuṭukka
Iṭaveṇṭum nilam Uḷppaṭa vaṇṭāḻai veḷurkū
ṟṟattu cāttamaṅkalattu Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāy mukattalai paṉṉatarapāṇiśvaramuṭaiyārum Umpa
r nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār taRead tirukoṭirukoṭikkuḻakarum koṟṟamaṅkalattu coṉ
ṉavāraṟivāḷum tāṉatoṅkapurattu tiruiṭumpāvaṉamuṭaiyārum kuṭapu
lattu Umāpatiśvaramuṭaiyārum tevatāṉattu Iṟuttu vanta nilattukku
koyilkaṇakku cimāheraśvapiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Iṭṭa kaṇakkup
paṭi nilam Aiñceyirumāvaraiyam patiṉeṭṭā
vatu mutal Ittevakku tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu Iṉṉilattukku
Iṟaikaṭṭiṉapaṭi tavuntu kāṇikkaṭaṉ velioṉṟukku ne
llu nūṟṟukkalattiṉāl pattāṟu Ākki Aṟupatiṉ kalane
llāka Iṟaikaṭṭiyum Innilattu talaimāṟu Ivvūril tiṟa
ppil Iṟuttu varukiṟa perkaḷile paṉṉapāṇiśvaramuṭaiyā
rkku mukkāle nāṉmāvaraiye Araikkāṇi muṉti
rikaik kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭu mā nilamum Uṭaiyār tirukoṭi
kkuḻakarku Iraṇṭaraiye nālumā muntirikai nilamum
coṉṉavāraṟivārkukuRead coṉṉavāraṟivārkkuEḻumā muntirikai kiḻ mukkāl nilamu
m tiruviṭumpāvaṉamuṭaiyārkku E
ḻu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi kiḻ Arai
mānilamum Umāpatiśvaramuṭaiyārk
ku Araiye nālumā Araikkāṇi
muntirikaik kiḻaraiye Irumāvarai
nilamum patiṉeṭṭāvatu mutal teva
tāṉaiṟaiyiliyāy Iṟukkavum kaṭava
tāka variyilārum varikūṟuceyvārkaḷu
m Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari taraccoṉṉo
m Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaippūṇṭi Uṭai
yārkku Ivvūril tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāṉa nilam patiṉeṭṭāvatu mutal I
ttevarkku tevatāṉayiṟaiyili
yāka kaikkoṇṭu nimantam celu
ttappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumanti
raolai Irācentiraciṅkamuventa
veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cetiyarāyaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ilaṅ
keśvaraṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāṅkaiyarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 8tiṉ 100 100 5 10ṉā
l piracātam ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi .
Digital edition of SII 38.476 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
